title: coverage_result.json -- identified coverage(s) for the claim v0.1
description: Produced by claim-analysis's checkpoint 2 (Coverage Identification). Matches claim fields against normalized policy clauses. A claim can trigger more than one coverage at once (e.g. a diagnosis benefit and a surgery benefit both applying) -- coverages is an array, not a single value, for that reason.

coverage_name.description: Coverage name as stated in the policy document. e.g. "뇌혈관질환진단비"

standardized_coverage_name.description: Normalized coverage code/name for cross-case comparison. e.g. cerebrovascular_diagnosis_benefit

applicable.description: Whether this coverage's conditions are met by the claim's facts, per the matched clause -- not whether the claim mentions the coverage.

matched_clause_ref.description: Pointer into policy-pipeline's normalized_policy_clause.json. null if no clause could be matched (record why in warnings).
